data.content: Plan approved: terminal-manager is the correct fix point because abortSession currently only marks aborted and signals the tracked child while finishSession and session-connection-manager later relabel the session from exit code. The proposed work to preserve aborted as a first-class terminal outcome, harden teardown for descendant processes, cancel pending follow-up/timer activity, and add abort-focused coverage is complete, feasible, and aligned with the reported failure. Keep repeated terminate calls idempotent and preserve terminated notification semantics when exit arrives.
